versions.version_description: This version is adapted to standard tuning, easy to read because all parts are with chords, contains all lyrics.

tuning: E A D G B E

recommended.song_name: Mom In Love Daddy In Space

content:
Date: Wed, 18 Jan 2006 20:20:49 -0500
From: Dominick roadster72 

Artist: Papa Roach
Title: scars
CD:
year: 2005


Papa Roach - Scars


  ****capo 2nd fret******




(chorus)
[tab][ch]A[/ch]               [ch]E[/ch]                   [ch]Bm[/ch]
I tear my heart open, I sow myself shut[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]D[/ch]                     [ch]A[/ch]
My weakness is that I care too much[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]E[/ch]                    [ch]Bm[/ch]
My scars remind me that the past is real[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]D[/ch]     [ch]E[/ch]      [ch]F#M[/ch]
I tear my heart open just to feel[/tab]



(verse 1)
[tab]                      [ch]C#m[/ch]
Drunk and I'm feeling down[/tab]
[tab]                      [ch]D[/ch]
And I just wanna be alone[/tab]
[tab]                             [ch]E[/ch]
I'm pissed cause you came around[/tab]
[tab]                      [ch]F#m[/ch]
Why don't you just go home[/tab]
[tab]                            [ch]C#m[/ch]
Cause you channel all your pain[/tab]
[tab]                          [ch]D[/ch]
And I can't help to fix myself[/tab]
[tab]                 [ch]E[/ch]
Your making me insane[/tab]

All I can say is



(chorus)
[tab][ch]A[/ch]               [ch]E[/ch]                   [ch]Bm[/ch]
I tear my heart open, I sow myself shut[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]D[/ch]                     [ch]A[/ch]
My weakness is that I care too much[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]E[/ch]                    [ch]Bm[/ch]
My scars remind me that the past is real[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]D[/ch]     [ch]E[/ch]      [ch]F#M[/ch]
I tear my heart open just to feel[/tab]



(verse 2)
[tab]                     [ch]C#m[/ch]
I tried to help you once[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]D[/ch]
Against my own advise[/tab]
[tab]                 [ch]E[/ch]
I saw you going down[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]F#m[/ch]
But you never realized[/tab]
[tab]                          [ch]C#m[/ch]
That your drowning in the water[/tab]
[tab]                  [ch]D[/ch]
I offered you my hand[/tab]
[tab]                    [ch]E[/ch]
Compassions in my nature[/tab]
[tab]                      [ch]A[/ch]
Tonight is our last stand[/tab]




(chorus)
[tab][ch]A[/ch]               [ch]E[/ch]                   [ch]Bm[/ch]
I tear my heart open, I sow myself shut[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]D[/ch]                     [ch]A[/ch]
My weakness is that I care too much[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]E[/ch]                    [ch]Bm[/ch]
My scars remind me that the past is real[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]D[/ch]     [ch]E[/ch]      [ch]D[/ch]
I tear my heart open just to feel[/tab]


(bridge)
[tab]([ch]D[/ch])
I can't help you fix yourself[/tab]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]
But at least I can say I tried[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]      [ch]A/F#[/ch]                  [ch]F#m[/ch]          [ch]E[/ch]
   I'm sorry but I gotta move on with my own life[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                                [ch]E[/ch]
   I can't help you fix yourself[/tab]
[tab]                          [ch]F#m[/ch]
But at least I can say I tried[/tab]
[tab]                            [ch]A[/ch]
I'm sorry but I gotta move on with my own life[/tab]




(chorus)
[tab][ch]A[/ch]               [ch]E[/ch]                   [ch]Bm[/ch]
I tear my heart open, I sow myself shut[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]D[/ch]                     [ch]A[/ch]
My weakness is that I care too much[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]E[/ch]                    [ch]D[/ch]
My scars remind me that the past is real[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]E[/ch]
I tear my heart open just to feel[/tab]



(chorus)
[tab][ch]A[/ch]               [ch]E[/ch]                   [ch]Bm[/ch]
I tear my heart open, I sow myself shut[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]D[/ch]                     [ch]A[/ch]
My weakness is that I care too much[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]E[/ch]                    [ch]Bm[/ch]
My scars remind me that the past is real[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]D[/ch]     [ch]E[/ch]       [ch]A[/ch]
I tear my heart open just to feel[/tab]




------------------------------------------------------------
IF you de tune to the original recording you can play it also  as:
-----------------------------------------------------------


(chorus)
(c)I tear my he(G)art open, I sow my(Dm)self shut
My weakness (f)is that I care too (c)much
My scars remind (G)me that the past is (Dm)real
I tear my heart (F)open j(G)ust t(Am)o feel



(verse 1)
Drunk and I'm feeling do(Em)wn
And I just wanna be alo(F)ne
I'm pissed cause you came aro(G)und
Why don't you just go ho(Am)me
Cause you channel all your pa(Em)in
And I can't help to fix my(F)self
Your making me in(G)sane
All I can say is




(bridge)
(F)I can't help you fix yourself
(G) But at least I can say I tried
(C)  I'm (C/B)sorry but I gotta(Am) move on with my (G)own life
(F)I can't help you fix yourself (G)
But at least I can say I tr(Am)ied
I'm sorry but I gotta move on(C) with my own life
